entities.name: N5 Title Generator
entities.context: Python script at N5/scripts/n5_title_generator.py that generates descriptive thread titles based on conversation content

entities.name: N5 Naming Conventions
entities.context: Standardized naming rules for thread titles including emoji prefix and character limits (18-30 target, 35 max)

entities.name: Noun-First Principle
entities.context: Naming convention where titles begin with a noun rather than a verb

entities.name: Emoji Prefix Convention
entities.context: System for prefixing thread titles with relevant emojis from a centralized legend

relationships.context: Script enforces 18-30 character target and 35 character maximum
